ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "city_state" TEXT /* City and state where the supplier is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "primary_contact" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_position" TEXT /* Position of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Current availability status of the supplier (e.g., None, Availability List) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type (e.g., BB, Container, Liner) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "average_growth_time" TEXT /* Average time it takes for the plant to grow to maturity */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the plant type */,
  "common_uses" TEXT /* Common uses for the plant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_product_types" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-product type mapping */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product type */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity or availability of the product type */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product type */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for delivery of the product type */,
  "last_ordered" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed for the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_product_types_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_product_types_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability_lists" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product type */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity or availability of the product type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the availability was last updated */,
  "next_expected_delivery" TEXT /* Expected date of the next delivery */,
  "expected_quantity" TEXT /* Expected quantity for the next delivery */,
  "reorder_level" TEXT /* Reorder level for the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_lists_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_lists_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement manager, supply chain analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the supplier information */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the supplier information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the communication */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier being communicated with */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the communication */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the supplier's response */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Details of the supplier's response */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
